## Meeting Purpose

[Follow-up discussion on potential GrowthX-Clarify collaboration for content strategy and execution](https://fathom.video/share/dm_41cCWixRAWztwZJjxwvBGNC6JjaXz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Clarify seeks clarity on GrowthX's operational cadence, service details, and content strategy approach](https://fathom.video/share/dm_41cCWixRAWztwZJjxwvBGNC6JjaXz?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
  - [GrowthX offers end-to-end content strategy and execution, including weekly syncs and Slack communication](https://fathom.video/share/dm_41cCWixRAWztwZJjxwvBGNC6JjaXz?tab=summary&timestamp=880.0)
  - [Clarify is evaluating options between AI-assisted, human-led, and hybrid content creation approaches](https://fathom.video/share/dm_41cCWixRAWztwZJjxwvBGNC6JjaXz?tab=summary&timestamp=1846.0)
  - [Next steps: Schedule meeting with Clarify's head of marketing to discuss further and make a decision by end of next week](https://fathom.video/share/dm_41cCWixRAWztwZJjxwvBGNC6JjaXz?tab=summary&timestamp=2104.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Service Overview

  - [End-to-end content strategy and execution](https://fathom.video/share/dm_41cCWixRAWztwZJjxwvBGNC6JjaXz?tab=summary&timestamp=407.0)
  - [Team structure: Strategy layer (20+ years SEO experience) and managing editor layer](https://fathom.video/share/dm_41cCWixRAWztwZJjxwvBGNC6JjaXz?tab=summary&timestamp=556.0)
  - [Weekly meetings, heavy Slack communication, and use of Notion for collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/dm_41cCWixRAWztwZJjxwvBGNC6JjaXz?tab=summary&timestamp=880.0)
  - [Content publishing across various CMS platforms, including Sanity](https://fathom.video/share/dm_41cCWixRAWztwZJjxwvBGNC6JjaXz?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)
  - [Two-month strategy sprint followed by 12-month execution phase](https://fathom.video/share/dm_41cCWixRAWztwZJjxwvBGNC6JjaXz?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)

### Content Strategy Approach

  - [Blend of competitor analysis, persona-based research, and long-tail keyword opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/dm_41cCWixRAWztwZJjxwvBGNC6JjaXz?tab=summary&timestamp=933.0)
  - [Focus on creating unique, high-quality content that stands out from AI-generated material](https://fathom.video/share/dm_41cCWixRAWztwZJjxwvBGNC6JjaXz?tab=summary&timestamp=1172.0)
  - [Incorporation of first-party data and repurposing of existing content (e.g., leadership videos, webinars)](https://fathom.video/share/dm_41cCWixRAWztwZJjxwvBGNC6JjaXz?tab=summary&timestamp=1407.0)
  - [Emphasis on refreshing and repurposing existing blog content to improve quality and SEO value](https://fathom.video/share/dm_41cCWixRAWztwZJjxwvBGNC6JjaXz?tab=summary&timestamp=1585.0)

### AI and Content Creation Landscape

  - [Discussion on the future of AI-generated content and its impact on search results](https://fathom.video/share/dm_41cCWixRAWztwZJjxwvBGNC6JjaXz?tab=summary&timestamp=1939.0)
  - [GrowthX's approach to standing out: higher quality, unique data incorporation, and compelling user experience](https://fathom.video/share/dm_41cCWixRAWztwZJjxwvBGNC6JjaXz?tab=summary&timestamp=1913.0)
  - [Clarify's consideration of using Profound for AI-assisted content creation with human editing](https://fathom.video/share/dm_41cCWixRAWztwZJjxwvBGNC6JjaXz?tab=summary&timestamp=1846.0)

### Clarify's Current Content Situation

  - [Success with founder-led content and supporting LinkedIn posts](https://fathom.video/share/dm_41cCWixRAWztwZJjxwvBGNC6JjaXz?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
  - [Large number of existing blog posts (1000+) with quality concerns](https://fathom.video/share/dm_41cCWixRAWztwZJjxwvBGNC6JjaXz?tab=summary&timestamp=1392.0)
  - [Opportunity to consolidate, redirect, and improve existing content](https://fathom.video/share/dm_41cCWixRAWztwZJjxwvBGNC6JjaXz?tab=summary&timestamp=1585.0)

### Pricing and Competition

  - [GrowthX's proposal noted as the most expensive option Clarify is considering](https://fathom.video/share/dm_41cCWixRAWztwZJjxwvBGNC6JjaXz?tab=summary&timestamp=1873.0)
  - [Clarify exploring pure AI, pure human, and hybrid (GrowthX) content creation options](https://fathom.video/share/dm_41cCWixRAWztwZJjxwvBGNC6JjaXz?tab=summary&timestamp=1895.0)
  - [Discussion on potential startup pricing or flexibility in GrowthX's pricing model](https://fathom.video/share/dm_41cCWixRAWztwZJjxwvBGNC6JjaXz?tab=summary&timestamp=1873.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule meeting with Clarify's head of marketing (Matt Hodges) for Wednesday, August 20th at 5 PM Eastern](https://fathom.video/share/dm_41cCWixRAWztwZJjxwvBGNC6JjaXz?tab=summary&timestamp=2104.0)
  - [GrowthX to share Notion doc with additional details](https://fathom.video/share/dm_41cCWixRAWztwZJjxwvBGNC6JjaXz?tab=summary&timestamp=2190.0)
  - [Clarify to evaluate options and aim to make a decision by the end of next week](https://fathom.video/share/dm_41cCWixRAWztwZJjxwvBGNC6JjaXz?tab=summary&timestamp=2104.0)
  - [If chosen, potential GrowthX engagement kickoff around September 15th (subject to availability)](https://fathom.video/share/dm_41cCWixRAWztwZJjxwvBGNC6JjaXz?tab=summary&timestamp=2145.0)
